creator: elofu17@hotmail.com
text:
Hi!

This is a very very very minor bug report. :)

I just tried running the command 'poll' (instead of 'status') for the suricata rc-script:

root# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/suricata poll

Result:
Waiting for PIDS: 1185^C

It just keep waiting. I have to press ctrl-c to abort the poll.


I haven't debugged this, since it is not really an issue to me (I never use 'poll', this was just a test).
